source.notes: Minimal generated-binary smoke proof only. It uses a headless terminal facade and fixture frame; it does not claim ratatui/crossterm ownership, live app-server transport, or a full interactive TUI.

cases.name: cancel-key-renders-fixture-frame
cases.title: Codex TUI Smoke
cases.input: Summarize next raw Codex TUI step
cases.expectedSnapshot:
Codex TUI Smoke
status: idle | model: gpt-5.2-codex
system> read-only upstream fixture
assistant> Rendered through Haxe to Rust
input> Summarize next raw Codex TUI step
key: ctrl-c
exit: cancelled
terminal: restored

cases.name: quit-key-renders-fixture-frame
cases.title: Codex TUI Smoke
cases.expectedSnapshot:
Codex TUI Smoke
status: waiting-for-input | model: gpt-5.2-codex
user> fixture prompt
assistant> fixture response
input> 
key: q
exit: quit
terminal: restored

create an AGENTS.md file with instructions for Codex
summarize conversation to prevent hitting the context limit
show current session configuration and token usage
start a side conversation in an ephemeral fork

show config layers and requirement sources for debugging
